summary: Completed comprehensive testing of sell-requests and job-applications features. All requested features verified working: 1) 'Vende con nosotros' form submits sell requests correctly, 2) 'Trabaja con nosotros' form submits job applications correctly, 3) Admin 'Ventas' tab displays sell requests with status, WhatsApp, and delete buttons, 4) Admin 'Empleo' tab displays job applications with status, WhatsApp, and delete buttons, 5) Status changes work for both types, 6) Delete functionality works for both types, 7) WhatsApp links generate correct wa.me URLs with pre-written messages.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with admin/admin123 returns JWT token (200 OK)
Backend: Invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: POST /api/sell-requests creates sell request (public, no auth required)
Backend: GET /api/sell-requests requires authentication (returns 401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/sell-requests returns list with authentication
Backend: PUT /api/sell-requests/{id}/status updates status to pending/contacted/closed
Backend: PUT /api/sell-requests/{id}/status returns 400 for invalid status
Backend: DELETE /api/sell-requests/{id} removes sell request
Backend: POST /api/job-applications creates job application (public, no auth required)
Backend: GET /api/job-applications requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/job-applications returns list with authentication
Backend: PUT /api/job-applications/{id}/status updates status to pending/reviewed/interviewed/hired/rejected
Backend: PUT /api/job-applications/{id}/status returns 400 for invalid status
Backend: DELETE /api/job-applications/{id} removes job application
Backend: GET /api/notifications endpoint requires auth and works
Frontend: 'Vende con Nosotros' page loads correctly
Frontend: Sell request form accepts name, phone, email, property type, location, description
Frontend: Sell request form submits successfully and shows confirmation
Frontend: 'Trabaja con Nosotros' page loads correctly
Frontend: Job application form accepts name, phone, email, position, linkedin, message
Frontend: Job application form submits successfully and shows confirmation
Frontend: Admin 'Ventas' tab shows sell requests list with count badge
Frontend: Admin 'Ventas' tab shows status dropdown, WhatsApp button, delete button per request
Frontend: Admin status change for sell request works (toast 'Estado actualizado')
Frontend: Admin delete for sell request works (confirmation dialog, toast 'Solicitud eliminada')
Frontend: Admin 'Empleo' tab shows job applications list with count badge
Frontend: Admin 'Empleo' tab shows status dropdown, WhatsApp button, delete button per application
Frontend: Admin status change for job application works (toast 'Estado actualizado')
Frontend: Admin delete for job application works (confirmation dialog, toast 'Aplicación eliminada')
Frontend: WhatsApp links generate correct wa.me URLs with personalized pre-written messages
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed records during testing. Original seed data (Juan Pérez for sell request, María García for job application) preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All sell-requests and job-applications features are working: 1) Public forms at /vende-con-nosotros and /trabaja-con-nosotros submit to backend correctly, 2) Admin tabs 'Ventas' and 'Empleo' show lists with status dropdown, WhatsApp contact button (green), and delete button, 3) Status changes persist correctly, 4) Delete shows confirmation dialog before removing, 5) WhatsApp links use wa.me format with URL-encoded personalized messages.

features_verified.sell_with_us_form: VERIFIED - Public form at /vende-con-nosotros submits to /api/sell-requests
features_verified.work_with_us_form: VERIFIED - Public form at /trabaja-con-nosotros submits to /api/job-applications
features_verified.admin_ventas_tab: VERIFIED - Shows sell requests with status, WhatsApp, delete
features_verified.admin_empleo_tab: VERIFIED - Shows job applications with status, WhatsApp, delete
features_verified.status_change_sell: VERIFIED - Can change status to pending/contacted/closed
features_verified.whatsapp_links: VERIFIED - Generates correct wa.me links with pre-written messages
features_verified.delete_sell_request: VERIFIED - Shows confirmation dialog, removes from list
features_verified.delete_job_application: VERIFIED - Shows confirmation dialog, removes from list
